title: Elastic Menu

statement.markdown:
## Statement: Create an elastic menu that expands and collapses smoothly when the mouse hovers over it.
### Requirements
1. The menu should consist of a list of items (links) that can be expanded and collapsed.
2. The menu items should display a smooth animation when hovered over.
3. The menu items should have a hover effect with a background color and text color change.
4. The menu should collapse when the mouse leaves the menu.

constraints: Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
The animation should be smooth and natural-looking.
The menu items should not overlap each other when expanded.
